headline: Is Franklin Resources (BEN) Pricey After Its BENJI Tokenized Fund Gains Real World Use?
summary: Scrypt Swiss AG’s move to integrate Franklin Resources (BEN) tokenized BENJI share class into its treasury operations gives investors a new reference point for how the asset manager’s blockchain efforts intersect with its traditional fund platform. See our latest analysis for Franklin Resources. Franklin Resources’ tokenization work is arriving alongside strong price momentum, with the share price at $33.50 after a 1-month share price return of 6.72% and a 90-day share price return of 33.79%...

headline: Franklin Resources: Time To Rotate The Upside
summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) is rated 'HOLD' due to mixed growth prospects, persistent cost pressures, and unconvincing AUM trends.
